reference: Are you sure about atrial fibrillation and the defibrillator implanted for atrial fibrillation? I doubt you are an atrial fibrillation patient if you have an automatic implantable cardioverter-defibrillator. Check again if it is ventricular fibrillation. Your breathlessness can be explained by an increase in heart rate or heart disease, which you did not mention.
text: Are you sure about atrial fibrillation and the defibrillator implanted for atrial fibrillation? I doubt you are an atrial fibrillation patient if you have an automatic implantable cardioverter defibrillator. Check again if it is ventricular fibrillation. Your breathlessness can be explained by an increase in heart rate or heart disease, which you did not mention.
